title: T-005 — SET-002 Org Profile Step UI (RHF form)
prompt:
Implement the SET-002 Org Profile Step page at `/onboarding/1` per PRD §14.3 step 1 + §14.4 SET-002.

Fields (RHF + Zod): `name` (required, 2-80 chars), `timezone` (required, IANA TZ select), `locale` (required, BCP-47 select), `currency` (required, ISO-4217 select), `logo` (optional file upload, ≤2MB PNG/JPG).

Submit calls `updateOnboardingState(orgId, {current_step: 2, completed_steps: [...prev, 1]})` from T-002 plus a separate `saveOrgProfile` call (out of scope for this task — stub the import). On success, navigate via `router.push('/onboarding/2')`.

No Skip button (step 1 is mandatory per PRD §14.3).

Do NOT bundle: actions (T-001/T-002), other step pages (T-006..T-010), launcher (T-004), saveOrgProfile action.

RED test command: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-step1`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 1 RHF form: name/timezone/locale/currency/logo; advances state to step 2.
pipeline_inputs.details: Page component apps/web/app/(onboarding)/1/page.tsx + step form client component. Uses shadcn `<Select>` for tz/locale/currency, `<Input>` for name, `<FileInput>` for logo. saveOrgProfile import is stubbed — actual save logic belongs to a separate task in 02-SETTINGS-a (out of scope).
out_of_scope: gs1_prefix field (gap-backlog S-U2; out of scope of this PRD slice)
acceptance_criteria: Given form rendered, when user submits empty form, then 4 required-field errors are shown and form does NOT call updateOnboardingState.

Given form filled with valid name/timezone/locale/currency, when user submits, then updateOnboardingState is called with {current_step:2, completed_steps:[1]} merge AND router.push('/onboarding/2') fires.
Given logo file >2MB selected, when user submits, then file-size error shown and submit blocked.
Given vitest with RTL covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED: RTL spec exercising 4 AC with mocked updateOnboardingState.
GREEN: implement form + page; all AC pass.
risk_red_lines: Do not call any DB action directly — must go through updateOnboardingState from T-002.
Do not render Skip button — step 1 is not skippable per PRD.
